tests.name: user can login with correct credentials
user cannot login with wrong credentials
tenant a cannot see tenant b products
tenant a cannot see tenant b sales
tenant a cannot see tenant b parties
cashier cannot access admin expenses route
regular user cannot access venqore routes
store creation does not fail when woocommerce env not set
duplicate store name or slug is rejected
featured products endpoint returns top sold items with positive stock
pos api rate limiter blocks requests after 300 hits per minute
product search is strictly isolated between tenants
product search returns wholesale price for wholesale customers when pricing is enabled
drm offline lock restricts usage when license is invalid offline
serial tracking validation checks serial numbers at checkout
barcode generator renders valid barcode svg or png
split payment with cash, bank, and credit ledger legs
plan limit enforcement blocks 6th transaction when limit is 5
negative stock blocking enforcement based on system settings
discount waterfall calculations are precise and correct
balanced journal entry persists with correct debit and credit lines
trial balance is zero after one or many balanced entries
createEntry throws InvalidArgumentException for unbalanced entry
createEntry throws if a line has both debit and credit greater than zero
createEntry throws if a line has both debit and credit equal to zero
createEntry throws if account_code does not exist for the current tenant
AccountingService constructor throws RuntimeException without tenant context
journal entries from tenant A are not visible under tenant B context
reverseEntry creates a new entry with swapped debits and credits
reverseEntry marks the original journal entry as is_reversed = 1
reverseEntry throws LogicException when entry is already reversed
reverseEntry throws InvalidArgumentException for a non-existent entry
getBalance returns net debit balance for a debit-normal account
getBalance returns net credit balance for a credit-normal account
getBalance excludes journal items belonging to reversed entries
getBalance asOf date excludes future entries
getAccountByCode creates an account when the code does not exist
accounts:recalculate command updates account balance from journal entries

it sets payment status to partial when underpaid
it sets payment status to paid when fully paid
it blocks over allocation at app layer
it blocks over allocation when cumulative amount exceeds total
it voids all active allocations for a journal entry
it reverts badge to unpaid after void
it auto closes invoice within roundoff tolerance
s001 fifo deducts oldest batch first
s015 partial production reversal blocks sold units
s022 roundoff tolerance auto closes invoice
s048 tax on advance posted at delivery not receipt
s055 zero cost opening stock blocked
s074 wip balance correct during production
s080 b27 final settlement composite entry
s094 byproduct nrv reduces main cost
s108 b30 disassembly allocates cost correctly
b27 posts correct composite journal entry
b27 requires approved by on journal entry
balance sheet balances to the paisa
reversed entries are excluded from reports
it returns tax report with 2200 and 2300 breakdown
it converts grams to kg correctly
it returns same qty when uom matches base
it returns the correct conversion factor
users can authenticate using the login screen
users can not authenticate with invalid password
email verification screen can be rendered
email is not verified with invalid hash
confirm password screen can be rendered
password is not confirmed with invalid password
reset password link screen can be rendered
reset password link can be requested
reset password screen can be rendered
password can be reset with valid token
correct password must be provided to update password
email verification status is unchanged when the email address is unchanged
correct password must be provided to delete account
redirect uses store admin data with store slug on failed expired file
creates store successfully when name is unique
blocks creation when same active store is owned by current user
blocks creation when same active store is owned by another user
blocks creation and asks to contact support when deleted by current user
blocks creation and asks for unique name when deleted by another user
it seeds opening balances with correct tenant scoping
